title: Crocodile Watches the Pieces Move
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on crocodile watches the pieces move, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Crocodile Watches the Pieces Move. The Straw Hats reach Rainbase while Marines, Baroque Works, and Crocodile’s casino pull every side into the same trap. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: What, why not!?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: There might be a lot of Baroque Works agents teeming all over Rainbow.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: So if one of them spots us, then Crocodile will know we're coming and plan ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Right, and let's not forget their specialty is assassination...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Alright! Time to kick Croco- Dile's ass!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Did you not listen to what I just said!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: But you know, Usopp...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I think I might agree with Luffy here!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We've got no time to play things safe. A short and direct approach might be our best chance.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: What's wrong? You gonna chicken' out, Usopp?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'll give my best then!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh jeez...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: The Town of Dreams, "Rainbase"

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Capt. Smoker, what're we doing here in Rainbase?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Woohoo! We can finally drink water, Usopp!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: WADUH! (Water)

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I don't know... Instinct, I suppose...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In any case, there's something suspicious going on in this country... Something big... I can feel it in my bones.

dialogue.speaker: Tashigi
dialogue.text: "Yo granny, hit us up with some water!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Give us 5 whole barrels of water!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Then do you think there's some come- lion between Crocodile and that criminal organization?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Water! Water! Water!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Maybe...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I still can't get my head around why the Princess of Alabama is travelling with the Straw-Eat pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In times like these, all you can really do is sit back and wait for another lead...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Damn, this water's good!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Yeah, it's killer!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: We should quickly head back and give some to the rest of the guys.

summary: This part develops crocodile watches the pieces move and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
